verdict.summary: Guide is useful on general safety behavior, but it contains several material inaccuracies: wrong Portuguese term for the shoulder, overstates a legal ban on changing a tyre, mislabels assistance numbers/operators, and gives unsafe tyre-pressure advice.

issues.problem: “aceite” in Portuguese means oil. This is not the motorway shoulder/emergency lane and will confuse readers in an emergency.
issues.suggestion: Replace with “berma / faixa de emergência” or, in Russian, “на обочину / аварийную полосу (berma/faixa de emergência)”.
issues.source: Código da Estrada terminology; Portuguese road-safety usage

issues.problem: Same terminology error: “aceite de emergência” is not a valid road term.
issues.suggestion: Write: “съехать на berma / faixa de emergência, если это можно сделать безопасно”.

issues.problem: The order is unsafe and contradicts the guide’s own later instruction. The reflective vest should be put on before leaving the vehicle, especially before placing the warning triangle.
issues.suggestion: Change to: “аварийка → плавно съехать на berma/faixa de emergência → надеть colete retrorrefletor до выхода → пассажиры за отбойник → треугольник ≥30 м позади, видимый минимум за 100 м → звонок assistência/112”.

issues.problem: 707 509 510 is not the general Infraestruturas de Portugal roadside number; it is commonly associated with Ascendi assistance. Labeling it as “IP” is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Brisa: 707 500 501; Ascendi: 707 509 510. Если не уверены в концессионере — используйте SOS-пост, номер на табличках трассы или звоните страховщику/112 при опасности”. Do not present 707 509 510 as IP.
issues.source: Brisa Assistência Rodoviária; Ascendi roadside assistance contacts

issues.current: НЕ меняйте колесо на обочине autoestrada даже если у вас есть запаска. Это прямо запрещено Código da Estrada
issues.problem: The safety advice is sensible, but the legal claim is overstated. Código da Estrada does not support the simple blanket statement that changing a wheel is “categorically” and “directly” prohibited in every emergency situation. Portuguese law generally prohibits stopping/parking on motorways except emergency/breakdown situations and regulates repairs/signalling; the practical recommendation should be framed as safety-first rather than a categorical legal ban.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: “На autoestrada не пытайтесь менять колесо на стороне движения и не оставайтесь у машины: это крайне опасно. При поломке остановка на berma/faixa de emergência допустима только как вынужденная мера; включите аварийку, наденьте жилет, выставьте треугольник и вызывайте assistência. Самостоятельная замена возможна только если это абсолютно безопасно, но на трассе обычно правильнее вызвать помощь”.

issues.current: Поставить треугольник на расстоянии ≥30 м позади автомобиля (ст. 88 Código da Estrada)
issues.problem: The 30 m part is incomplete. Article 88 also requires the warning triangle to be visible from at least 100 m where possible. On fast roads this is an important safety detail.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Поставить треугольник позади автомобиля минимум за 30 м и так, чтобы он был виден минимум за 100 м; ставить только после того, как надели жилет и если это безопасно”.

issues.current: страховка assistência em viagem обычно покрывает эвакуацию и shuttle до ближайшего СТО. Обычно бесплатно первые 50–100 км.
issues.problem: Too broad. Assistance limits vary substantially by insurer and policy: towing distance, passenger transport, replacement car, hotel/taxi and territorial coverage are policy-specific. “Usually free first 50–100 km” may mislead drivers into assuming coverage.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Условия зависят от apólice: проверьте лимит reboque, transporte de passageiros, viatura de substituição, franquias и лимит километров. Не обещайте 50–100 км как правило; приведите это только как пример возможного лимита”.
issues.source: Portuguese motor insurance policy conditions vary by insurer

issues.problem: The concession/operator mapping is oversimplified and partly confusing. A single motorway number can have different operators on different sections, and the list gives conflicting information for A24 by assigning it to both Ascendi and Norscut. It also omits/oversimplifies several concessions and may lead users to call the wrong operator.
issues.suggestion: Replace the route list with a safer instruction: “На autoestrada звоните по номеру, указанному на SOS-посте/табличках участка, или используйте SOS-пост; если не уверены — звоните страховщику assistência em viagem или 112 при опасности/ДТП. Примеры: Brisa 707 500 501; Ascendi 707 509 510; AE do Atlântico 707 200 002 — но оператор зависит от конкретного участка”.
issues.source: Brisa, Ascendi and concessionaire official assistance pages

issues.problem: Overstated. SOS posts are common on many motorways, but “always” is too absolute; availability and spacing can vary by road/section and maintenance status. Drivers should also use mobile phone/112/insurer if no post is reachable.
issues.suggestion: Write: “На многих autoestradas есть SOS-посты примерно через регулярные интервалы; если ближайшего поста нет или идти к нему опасно — звоните 112 при опасности/ДТП или assistência/страховщику с телефона”.

issues.current: GNR Brigada de Trânsito выезжает на trafiq accidents.
issues.problem: Contains an English typo/malformed phrase and outdated/loose naming. “Brigada de Trânsito” is not the current usual public-facing designation; road policing is commonly referred to as GNR/Unidade Nacional de Trânsito or traffic patrols. For the reader, the key is 112 for injuries/danger and police attendance when needed.
issues.suggestion: Write: “112 — единый номер экстренных служб. При пострадавших, аварии, препятствии на полосе или опасной ситуации вызывают 112; на место может приехать GNR/PSP traffic patrol depending on location”.

issues.current: если поломка из-за ямы / мусора, можно претендовать у концессионера (707 500 501)
issues.problem: Misleading because 707 500 501 is Brisa, not a universal concessionaire number. Also compensation is not automatic: liability depends on proof and on whether the concessionaire can rebut responsibility/compliance with safety duties.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Если повреждение вызвано ямой, предметом на дороге, жидкостью, животным и т.п., фиксируйте место, km marker, фото/видео, свидетелей и по возможности relatório da GNR. Претензию подавайте конкретному concessionário участка, а не автоматически в Brisa”.
issues.source: Lei n.º 24/2007, art. 12; concessionaire complaint procedures

issues.problem: A universal 30-day claim deadline is not supported here and may be wrong. Different mechanisms have different time limits: insurer notification periods may be policy-based; Livro de Reclamações has response rules; civil liability limitation periods are different. Stating “30 days” as a hard deadline is misleading.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Подайте претензию как можно быстрее, ideally in the first days, and follow the concessionaire/insurer procedure. Do not state a universal 30-day legal deadline unless you cite the exact rule/policy.”
issues.source: Lei n.º 24/2007; general Portuguese civil-liability and complaints rules

issues.current: Concession часто возмещает стоимость шины, если докажете причину
issues.problem: Overpromising. Concessionaires do not “often” reimburse just because a tyre was damaged; claims are frequently contested, and the operator may argue absence of fault or that patrol/maintenance duties were fulfilled. The burden/proof regime depends on the cause and facts.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Компенсация возможна, но не гарантирована. Нужны доказательства причины, места и ущерба: фото, km marker, invoice, tow receipt, witnesses, relatório/auto da GNR if available. Concessionário may reject the claim.”
issues.source: Lei n.º 24/2007, art. 12; Portuguese motorway liability case law/practice

issues.current: Летом +0.3 бар от номинала — португальская жара «сдувает» шины
issues.problem: Unsafe and technically wrong. Heat generally increases tyre pressure, not “deflates” tyres. Drivers should not add a blanket +0.3 bar to the manufacturer’s recommended cold pressure unless the vehicle/tyre guidance or load condition requires it. Tyre pressure should be checked cold and set to the vehicle placard/manual values.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: “Давление проверять на холодных шинах и выставлять по табличке автомобиля/мануалу с учётом нагрузки. Не снижать давление на горячих шинах и не добавлять универсальные +0.3 bar без рекомендации производителя”.
issues.source: IMT/road-safety tyre guidance; tyre manufacturer safety guidance

issues.current: Проверять давление раз в месяц на заправке (бесплатно у Galp/BP)
issues.problem: “Free at Galp/BP” is too broad. Air pumps may be free at many stations, but not guaranteed; some are paid, unavailable or inaccurate.
issues.suggestion: Write: “Проверять давление раз в месяц на холодных шинах; на многих заправках есть компрессор, но он не всегда бесплатный/исправный”.

issues.current: Infraestruturas de Portugal — Segurança rodoviária, https://www.infraestruturasdeportugal.pt/
issues.problem: The source is only the homepage, not a specific road-safety or roadside-assistance page. It is weak support for operational claims such as emergency numbers and SOS posts.
issues.suggestion: Use a specific IP road-safety/contact/assistance page if citing IP, or remove IP-specific claims and cite the relevant concessionaire pages instead.

issues.problem: This is only the IMT homepage, not a specific tyre-safety page. It does not substantiate the tyre-pressure advice, and the guide’s current advice is unsafe.
issues.suggestion: Replace with a specific IMT/ANSR tyre-safety page or a tyre manufacturer safety source explaining cold-pressure checks and manufacturer placard values.

missing_topics: Mention that the warning triangle must be visible from at least 100 m, not only placed 30 m behind the vehicle.
Clarify that 707 numbers are often paid-rate numbers and may be expensive from some phones; in danger, injuries or live-lane obstruction use 112.
Explain what information to give when calling assistance: motorway number, direction, km marker, nearest exit/service area, lane/shoulder position, number of occupants, injuries, vehicle plate.
Add instruction not to stand between the vehicle and the barrier/traffic side and not to walk along the carriageway to find help if unsafe.
Add that animals, children and passengers should be moved behind the safety barrier where possible, but not across lanes.
Add that compensation claims against a motorway concessionaire are possible but evidence-heavy and not guaranteed; cite Lei n.º 24/2007 for objects/liquids/animals on motorways.
